Explains for some permission requestsin my application, I request somes sensitive permissions to make functions of application work properly:
android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO: to use microphone to record voice as the main feature of the app described
android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE: to save files on storage (internal and external)
android.permission.READ_PHONE_STATE: to detect incomming calls to handle voice recording properly, stop and save recording when user pick up the call.Report abuseGoogle SitesReport abuse
